_note: Override DDB-synced language data with campaign-specific assignments. Keys are player IDs (kim, jerome, ed, jen, nick) — these match character-assignments.json.

languages.note: Unknown to all Europeans. Her mother's language.

kim.languageNote: Zarina's Elvish is from the Americas — completely unknown to any European NPC. To them it sounds like no language they have encountered. Her father was English but she did not learn English from him — only his stories of a place she has never seen.

jerome.languageNote: Barry speaks Common. As a Van Helsing bloodline descendant he may have encountered other languages in his family's records — this can surface as an arc beat.

ed.playerNote: Spurt is currently played by AI but has the same character data slot.

languages.note: Universal dragon tongue. Spurt thinks in Draconic.

ed.languageNote: Spurt is from the Americas but speaks Common and Draconic. Draconic being universal means he can speak it anywhere in the world — it predates human civilization on every continent. In Session 0 no NPC speaks it but Vladislav recognizes it immediately.

spurt._alias: Same as ed — Spurt AI player slot.

languages.note: Universal dragon tongue. Spurt thinks in Draconic.

spurt.languageNote: Spurt is from the Americas. Speaks Common and Draconic. Draconic is universal.
